recommended_pattern: A time-bounded launch arc: concept, event or drop date, participation details, proof of energy, and one decisive action.

decision_rules.if_event_date: Keep date, timezone, venue or access method visible through the participation decision.
decision_rules.if_limited_drop: Frontload the release condition and inventory rule without manufacturing scarcity.
decision_rules.if_shareable: Compose a compact visual moment that carries the campaign identity when captured or reposted.

anti_patterns: Persistent product navigation that dilutes a single event or drop.
A countdown without a clear action or real deadline.
Campaign visuals that do not identify what is launching.
